key_risks: Post-FOMC yield rise triggers rotation out of growth themes
Low-volume holiday session amplifies any reversal in momentum names
Jobless claims surprise on June 18 shifts risk appetite before exit

portfolio.rationale: Strong recent 7d momentum and semiconductor supply chain resilience likely to persist in low-news short week.
Factor has shown persistence; limited catalysts reduce reversal risk over holiday-shortened window.
Defense budget stability and recent outperformance support continuation into quiet trading period.
Clinical and M&A driven sector exhibits elevated short-term volatility that can deliver positive drift.

portfolio_rationale: Concentrated tilt to recent momentum leaders across semis, factor, aerospace, and biotech to capture continuation in a low-event week ending before next macro releases.
rationale_summary: Short trading week with Juneteenth holiday favors assets showing recent price strength; allocations target 100% in four high-momentum equity themes.
